notes: Played several matches with no problems, working perfectly out of the box.
title: Bean Battles

cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes:
The game runs perfectly graphically, but there are a few mouse bugs. Mounting a vehicle, launching an airstrike, or going into the escape menu will sometimes cause the cursor to be stuck in the middle of the screen until the game is tabbed out of and back into again. This can be fixed (for the most part) by setting 

-nomousegrab

 as a launch option, but will still occur occasionally.
title: Bean Battles
